form.title: Sales and Other Dispositions of Capital Assets
form.department: Department of the Treasury - Internal Revenue Service

part_I_short_term_transactions.description: Short-term capital assets held one year or less

A.description: Short-term transactions reported on Form 1099-B with basis reported to IRS

B.description: Short-term transactions reported on Form 1099-B with basis NOT reported to IRS

C.description: Short-term transactions not reported on Form 1099-B

G.description: Short-term transactions reported on Form 1099-DA with basis reported to IRS

H.description: Short-term transactions reported on Form 1099-DA with basis NOT reported to IRS

I.description: Short-term digital asset transactions not reported on Form 1099-DA

part_II_long_term_transactions.description: Long-term capital assets held more than one year

D.description: Long-term transactions reported on Form 1099-B with basis reported to IRS

E.description: Long-term transactions reported on Form 1099-B with basis NOT reported to IRS

F.description: Long-term transactions not reported on Form 1099-B

J.description: Long-term transactions reported on Form 1099-DA with basis reported to IRS

K.description: Long-term transactions reported on Form 1099-DA with basis NOT reported to IRS

L.description: Long-term digital asset transactions not reported on Form 1099-DA
